verificationLabel: Round 17 result tracker updated Saturday 27 June 2026
summary: Round 17 result tracking is live. Rabbitohs over Eels and Bulldogs over Titans are verified correct, while Panthers over Cowboys and Storm over Sea Eagles are logged as user-reported misses pending a clean score cross-check. No Round 17 charity bet was locked, so the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger remains 3-2 and +$0.53.

scoreboard.result: Sea Eagles def Storm, exact score pending
scoreboard.note: User reported a loss on the Storm leg. The preview flagged 4 Pines and Tom Trbojevic as the danger, but the page now records the miss honestly.
Canberra get the GIO edge and a stronger forward platform through Horsburgh, Tapine, Hudson Young, Hosking and Brailey. Dragons are improved but still need a road proof point.
Newcastle get the home-spine edge with Kalyn Ponga, Fletcher Sharpe and Dylan Brown. Tigers regain Adam Doueihi and Alex Twal but lose Jock Madden and Patrick Herbert.

liveAlerts.text: Round 17 result tracking is live: Rabbitohs and Bulldogs verified correct, Panthers and Storm logged as user-reported misses.
Charity ledger remains 3-2, $31.50 invested, $32.03 returned and +$0.53 settled profit.
No Round 17 charity bet was locked; external bet-slip losses do not move the Mark Hughes Foundation ledger.
Biggest miss so far: Panthers over Cowboys was the top-ranked raw tip and failed.
Storm over Sea Eagles also failed according to the user; exact score still needs a clean cross-check.
Sharks are on the Round 17 bye.
